subject: Welcome to Oxen
title: Welcome to Oxen
body_line_2: Below are your account details and your dedicated account manager.
body_next_steps: Your account manager will reach out within 24 hours to walk you through your dashboard and answer any questions about your setup. In the meantime, you can explore your account at
note_account_share: Share these details with your accountant or payment counterparties.
list_item_1: Send and receive payments via SEPA Instant, Faster Payments and SWIFT
list_item_2: Issue physical and virtual cards for your team
list_item_3: Convert between fiat and crypto from your dashboard
list_item_4: Invite team members and set access permissions
